'''12-4C-41''' or '''Wuntoo Forcee Forwun''' was one of the [[12-4C-41 traffic control droid]]s which worked in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] as part of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] automated support structure.

==Biography==
12-4C-41 served as a traffic controller. This [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was one of the few that survived [[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9's]] near-destruction of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]], for she had [[Dismemberment/Legends|dismembered]] a number of them during her rampage.

12-4C-41 managed to discover EV-9D9's data trail out of Cloud City, and spent the next few years tracking her down. He found her in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]], and quickly incapacitated her with four [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shots. He then removed her abhorrent third optic sensor and her pain-simulator button, depriving EV-9D9 of the sensations of [[Death/Legends|death]]. He called it "balancing the equation," reminding her that she had disabled many of the [[12-4C-41 traffic control droid|12-series droids]] on Cloud City. He freed all of EV-9D9's [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] droids, and together they slowly dismantled her until she no longer functioned.
